attributes.action: Introduce Bus Travel Discounts for National Disability Card Holders
attributes.additional_details:
Conditions involving chronic pain, mental health difficulties, neurodivergence, or fluctuating illnesses often fail to meet standard mobility assessments. Despite this, these individuals still face reduced earning capacity, higher living costs, and severe barriers to community integration. 
The National Disability Card is an established, verified proof of disability in the UK. By expanding local travel concessions to include National Disability Card holders—mirroring the existing Carers' Card
attributes.background: Brighton & Hove City Council to partner with local bus operators to introduce discounted bus fares for residents who hold a National Disability Card but do not qualify for the English National Concessionary Travel Scheme (ENCTS) free bus pass.

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level. We also can't accept petitions that call for an action relating to a particular organisation such as National Disability Card Ltd.

You could also raise your suggestion with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors

You could also ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue, including by asking them to present a public (paper) petition about this.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP

And you can find out how to ask your MP to present a public (paper) petition here: https://www.parliament.uk/get-involved/sign-a-petition/paper-petitions/

We could accept a petition calling for a change to the categories of disabled people eligible for concessionary travel in England, if there's a specific change that you'd like to see. You can find the Department for Transport's national guidance here: https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/guidance-for-local-authorities-on-eligibility-for-disabled-people/assessing-eligibility-of-disabled-people-for-concessionary-bus-travel
